achievements: Developed a robust RAG pipeline using LangChain, Azure OpenAI embeddings, and Cosmos DB with DiskANN vector search for enhanced semantic code retrieval, scaling efficiently as repository size grew.

Engineered a hash-based change detection system using SHA-256 on AST nodes, segmenting codebases by function to optimize AI embedding generation costs by 85% through eliminating redundant vector database updates.

Collaborated to architect a FastAPI backend that parses over 50,000 lines of code daily across 15+ programming languages via Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) analysis, enabling automated real-time documentation.
Integrated Computer Vision capabilities into a robotic arm control loop for food-preparation tasks, significantly improving real-time positioning accuracy through end-to-end calibration optimization.
Designed and implemented a modular LLM + robot control codebase, establishing clean architectural boundaries that facilitated seamless parallel integration with a dedicated Computer Vision team.

projects.name: VR LLM Conversational Agent
projects.description: Engineered a real-time VR conversational agent integrating Gemini 2.5 Flash with Google Cloud Speech-to-Text and Text-to-Speech, achieving an average response latency of 1.8s through parallel API calls, caching, and audio preprocessing. Conducted a within-subjects experimental study (N=18) proving embodied gestures significantly outperform visual loading indicators for perceived animacy (p < 0.05), translating a latency engineering problem into a concrete HCI design recommendation. Co-authored a paper submitted to MIT's Presence journal.

projects.name: Kelp Forest Semantic Segmentation
projects.description: Achieved a Top 100 ranking (83rd percentile) in a DrivenData satellite imagery competition by implementing a U-Net with an EfficientNet-B3 backbone for precise semantic segmentation of kelp forests in noisy real-world satellite imagery. Developed a robust streak-detection pipeline utilizing an ensemble of CNN classifiers (ResNet, DenseNet) with hard voting to effectively identify and filter atmospherically corrupted satellite images from training data, achieving an F1 score of 0.952 on streak classification.

projects.name: AI Resume Builder & Interview Prep Tool
projects.description: Developed a full-stack AI tool integrating Gemini 2.5 Flash to power an "Interview GPT" feature that generates personalized interview questions by cross-referencing user resumes with an interview prep database (DSA problems, STAR templates), including robust error handling. Implemented real-time PDF preview and ATS-optimized resume generation, alongside Firebase Authentication with Google OAuth for secure user management.
